THE PENCIL BOX

Home Products Order Feedback/Enquiries Study Tips About Us

About Us:

Our Vision:

To become a trusted stationery brand that empowers students, professionals, artists, and dreamers around the world to create, organize, and achieve their goals—one page at a time.

Our Mission:

To inspire creativity, learning, and self-expression by providing thoughtfully designed, high-quality stationery that makes every idea worth writing down.

Our Story:

Every great idea starts somewhere.

For us, it started with a simple pencil box—a small container that held big dreams. Inside were pencils that sketched first masterpieces, pens that wrote unforgettable stories, rulers that measured ambitious projects, and erasers that reminded us mistakes are simply part of learning.

Inspired by these everyday moments, The Pencil Box was created to celebrate the power of creativity and education. We believe stationery is more than just school or office supplies. It is a companion for every journey, whether you're taking notes in class, planning your next business venture, drawing your imagination, or writing down ideas that could change the world. Our goal is to provide reliable, stylish, and affordable stationery that helps people stay organized, express themselves, and bring their ideas to life. Every product we offer is chosen with care because we know that even the simplest tools can inspire extraordinary achievements.

At The Pencil Box, we're proud to be part of your story—from your first sketch to your biggest success. Because every masterpiece begins with a single pencil.

Frequently Asked Questions:

What products does The Pencil Box sell?

We offer a wide range of stationery products, including pens, pencils, notebooks, sketchbooks, highlighters, markers, erasers, rulers, art supplies, desk organisers, and more. Whether you're a student, professional, or artist, we have something for everyone.


Where are your products made?

Our products are sourced from trusted manufacturers who meet our quality standards. We carefully select suppliers to ensure every item is reliable, durable, and designed for everyday use.


Do you offer eco-friendly stationery?

Yes! We are committed to reducing our environmental impact by offering selected products made from recycled materials, sustainably sourced paper, and reusable stationery whenever possible.


Do you offer discounts for schools or businesses?

Yes. We provide special bulk pricing and customised orders for schools, educational institutions, and businesses. Please contact our team for a personalised quotation.


How can I contact customer support?

You can reach us through our Contact Us page, by email, or by phone during our business hours. Our friendly team is always happy to help with any questions.
